CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleButtonClickEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
-- Closing the title: hide it immediately for snappy feedback... if isvalid(self.Target) then self.Target.Enable = false end
-- ...and record the dismissal on the server (server_main) so it survives instance-room -- round trips. TitleManager re-hides the title on every map01 re-entry based on this flag. _TitleManager:MarkDismissed()
local bgmRUID = "0428442a33fd48a193a1a39c1602cf0c" local volume = 1.0 _SoundService:PlayBGM(bgmRUID, volume)
